About This Story

In this inspiring story, Lucas faces a big challenge. He loses his sight when he is young. People say he cannot do many things anymore. But Lucas finds a way to climb mountains. Through determination and courage, he achieves his dream of climbing Mount Everest. A powerful message about overcoming fear and finding new paths.

Imagine you are 14 years old. You lose your sight completely. You cannot see your friends. You cannot see the world around you. You feel trapped. You feel afraid. Everyone says you cannot do things anymore. But then, at age 16, Lucas read something that changed everything. A group was taking blind kids rock climbing. "Who would be crazy enough?" he thought. So he signed up. This decision would lead him to the top of the world's tallest mountain.

Mount Everest is the tallest mountain in the world. Climbing it is extremely dangerous. Most climbers need perfect vision to navigate ice, snow, and deep cracks. This story takes place in a world where people believed blind climbers could never reach the top.
